connections.when: Storytelling orchestration activates analysis as Phase 1 to discover findings
connections.yields: data-analysis discovery phase for narrative construction

connections.when: Storytelling activates visualization as Phase 2 to render insights as charts
connections.yields: data-visualization chart rendering for story evidence

connections.when: Storytelling activates dashboard design as Phase 3 to arrange visuals into layout
connections.yields: dashboard-design layout arrangement for narrative flow

connections.when: Storytelling can invoke chart interpretation for reverse-flow analysis of existing visuals
Data storytelling methodology complements executive narrative framing and stakeholder communication
connections.yields: executive-storytelling audience framing and stakeholder patterns

connections.when: Data stories often become presentation slides; slide design principles apply to chart narratives
connections.yields: slide-design visual hierarchy for presentation output

connections.when: Data story markdown can feed into Gamma for presentation generation
connections.yields: gamma-presentations automated slide generation from story markdown

connections.when: Data story narratives must sound human, not AI-generated
connections.yields: ai-writing-avoidance authentic voice patterns for data narratives
